title: asclepias pseudofimbriata
intro: Asclepias pseudofimbriata, also known as the Mexican whorled milkweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the milkweed family (Asclepiadaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Asclepias pseudofimbriata include wound healing, reducing fever, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
